Thank you for contributing!
You may have already read the [README](../README.md), but please double-check the following before opening a pull request:

* Rebase your changes on the latest `main` branch and squash commits when appropriate.
* Add or update unit tests when needed.
* Run the build and ensure all tests pass before submitting.
* If this work is tied to a GitHub issue, mention it in the description (for example, `Fixes: #100`). If there is no issue, describe the purpose of the change, the main edits, impact, and how you verified the behavior in detail.

For more context, see the [README](../README.md).

Thank you!
